title: Organize workout tracking by day of the week with daily exercise intervals

requirements.summary: Add day-of-week selector to workout entry form
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes a day-of-week selector (dropdown or button group)
Selected day is submitted along with exercise name, sets, reps, weight, duration, and notes
Form validation ensures a day is selected before submission

file_operations.description: Add a day-of-week selector field to the workout entry form. Include a dropdown or button group allowing users to select from Monday through Sunday. Update form state to capture the selected day. Ensure form validation requires a day selection before submission. Pass the selected DayOfWeek enum value to the addWorkout mutation alongside existing exercise data (name, sets, reps, weight, duration, notes).

requirements.summary: Group workout history by day of the week
acceptanceCriteria: Workout history displays sections for each day of the week (Monday through Sunday)
Each day section lists all exercises logged for that day with their sets and reps (e.g., 'Benchpress 3x8', 'Deadlift 4x8')
Days with no workouts are either hidden or shown as empty
Exercises within each day are displayed in a clear, readable format

file_operations.description: Reorganize the workout history display to group workout sessions by day of the week. Process the workout history data to group sessions by their day field (Monday through Sunday). Display each day as a section header with exercises listed below showing format like 'Benchpress 3x8, Deadlift 4x8'. Include sets and reps prominently in the display format. Handle days with no workouts by either hiding them or showing empty state. Maintain chronological order within each day section. Preserve existing loading, error, and empty states.

Update the query hook to ensure workout sessions include the day field from the backend. The backend interface already returns WorkoutSession objects with a day: DayOfWeek field, so verify the data structure is properly typed and accessible to components consuming this hook.
